crons.comment: 24h reminder emails — fires daily at 6:00 PM ACST (08:30 UTC). Sends reminder to all confirmed bookings with pickup tomorrow.
2h SMS reminders — Hobby plan: runs once daily at 4PM ACST. Upgrade to Pro for every-30-min checks.
Post-job invoices — Hobby plan: runs once daily at 8PM ACST. Upgrade to Pro for every-15-min checks.
Review request emails — fires daily at 10:30 AM ACST (01:00 UTC). Targets completed jobs from 3 days ago.
